scripts.deploy:frontend: npm --prefix packages/frontend run build && tar -czf deploy.tar -C packages/frontend dist captain-definition && npx caprover deploy -t ./deploy.tar -n notify -a rail-service-client && rm -f deploy.tar
scripts.deploy:backend: npm --prefix packages/backend run build && tar -czf deploy-backend.tar -C packages/backend dist package.json captain-definition && npx caprover deploy -t ./deploy-backend.tar -n notify -a rail-service-api && rm -f deploy-backend.tar
